entry.title: Why Singapore Works (For Me)
entry.summary: SV gave me scale. Taiwan gave me roots. Singapore gave me perspective. This is what the city actually does to you.

Both genres exist in abundance. This is neither."),mdx("h2",null,"What I expected"),mdx("p",null,"I expected a clean, efficient, slightly sterile city. I'd heard the jokes about it being a fine city in both senses. I expected a tech hub that was trying to be Silicon Valley in Asia."),mdx("p",null,"I was half right."),mdx("h2",null,"What I got"),mdx("p",null,"Singapore is not trying to be Silicon Valley. It doesn't want to be. It has its own model \u2014 one built on pragmatism, extreme connectedness to trade routes, and a political stability that is uncomfortable to some people and reassuring to others."),mdx("p",null,"What surprised me:"),mdx("p",null,mdx("strong",{parentName:"p"},"The hawker culture is genuinely world-class.")," I don't say this as a compliment to Singapore tourism \u2014 I say it as someone who grew up eating well in Taiwan and ate at restaurants for four years in California. The quality per dollar ratio at a hawker centre in Singapore is, in my experience, unmatched anywhere."),mdx("p",null,mdx("strong",{parentName:"p"},"The multiracial texture is real.")," Singapore is not post-racial \u2014 it has racial categories baked into its national ID system. But the daily reality of Chinese-Malay-Indian-Western communities sharing the same blocks, the same hawker centres, the same MRT cars \u2014 it produces something that feels less performative and more just... normal, in a way that I hadn't experienced before."),mdx("p",null,mdx("strong",{parentName:"p"},"The startup ecosystem is earlier stage than the Valley, which means more room.")," In San Francisco, you're competing with everything. In Singapore, you're often one of a handful of companies doing a specific thing. That has costs \u2014 less talent density, fewer Series B investors \u2014 but it also has advantages that are easy to underestimate."),mdx("h2",null,"What doesn't work"),mdx("p",null,mdx("strong",{parentName:"p"},"The heat.")," I will never fully adapt. But it creates a specific anxiety for founders \u2014 the rules for self-employed / startup founders are less clear than for employed professionals."),mdx("p",null,mdx("strong",{parentName:"p"},"The social formality.")," Singapore is polite in a way that takes time to read.
